note: SHIPPED DEFAULT: autonomy DISABLED. An operator opts in via a gitignored AUTONOMY.local.json (see CLAUDE.md / init-operator). Plan-scoped autonomy for THIS practice repo only (Val ratified 2026-07-13 via remote control). The orchestrator may merge in-scope worker/scaffolding PRs to `ready-for-main` without a per-PR human click, but ONLY via `dispatch merge`, which enforces every gate (attempt passed; bound reviewer PASS; ci green; PR head == reviewed worker_commit; base still == bound base_sha) fail-closed. `main` promotion stays human. Val reviews results after the fact; HALT (.orchestrator/HALT) pauses everything. Revoke by deleting this file or setting enabled=false. A different project gets its own policy decision - this grant does not transfer.
